All right, so reselling ascension, the last of the mod portion is after you receive money and then you did the fulfillment, which is that arrow, we are now at recurring EFT and or getting more dollars from these people so that we can provide more value and transform their lives. So the first is what we call the abandoned hope sale, which is at the halfway point, which is week three. So that is the abandoned hope sale in a nutshell. I will explain the what to say and when to say it in the actual sales video. The second opportunity is the back end. So if you have not succeeded to sell them the abandoned hope sale, then you have to sell them on the back end. I have to be clear here though, the abandoned hope is the halfway point sale is where you are going to close, 70 to 80% of the sales. So you should be shooting for 70 to 80% of people who signed up for the challenge to be closed at the halfway point. So you need to very much approach that as a sale. The back end is only to mop up anyone who you could not get a strong commitment from. At the end we have kind of two scenarios, we have one and lost and obviously not refunded, that is the goal. Another alternative is if someone lost, the goal is to get them onto EFT. So money, it is not super common and I will show you how we work around that provide value and worst case scenarios so that you can still not have to worry about giving the dollars back. These people are some of the highest value clients out there. I think it is because they see results but they did not hit the goal and there is some sort of open loop there.
